reason: Candidate 1 best matches the Cel reference layout (front/back+height scale, 4-expression row, 3/4 profile, hand/foot/necklace close-ups, back-view analysis, 2 poses). Fair-skinned Korean woman, late-20s, slim, long dark-brown hair; correct outfit: white ribbed tank + high-waist blue denim shorts + white low sneakers + tan crossbody bag + lotus pendant + small studs. Identity consistent across all sub-views, clean hands/feet, monotonic height ruler reading ~168cm. Cand 2 has a broken height ruler (160-160-150) and shows the crossbody in main front/back; cands 3 and 4 have non-monotonic/scrambled height rulers and weaker cross-view identity consistency.
